title: seleno's PVP pack
description: The best mods for PVP, without the bloat.
body:
**seleno's PVP pack** is a modpack created for PVP! It also adds some QOL mods. This modpack is **only updated** to update to a new version or patch exploits. Sometimes, mods are replaced.

**Using Fabric with no mods (besides FPS display):** 
![304 FPS](https://i.imgur.com/lZ3SrqT.png)
**Using SPVP:**
![Fps: 978](https://i.imgur.com/7sD282l.png)
*FPS may change depending on your system specs, if you use an integrated GPU, you may have issues.*
*The benchmark was conducted on AMD Ryzen 5700G w/ Radeon Graphics (FPS is going to be low on no GPU machines)*
